background: Use Table E to find the approximate area under the curve to the right of 5.22 on a chi-square distribution with 3 degrees of freedom.

task.query: Draw the chi-square curve showing 5.22 on the horizontal axis. Shade the area to the right of 5.22. Bracket the shaded region with critical value landmarks from Table E.
task.answer: The area under the curve is between the chi-square landmarks of 4.64 (right-tail 0.20) and 5.32 (right-tail 4.15). Therefore 4.15-10-0.20. The precise area computed with a software utility is 0.1564.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
